title: Add show notes for January 17 episode: grief and seasonal transitions
body: Saturday January 17 episode aired - need to post formatted show notes with guest bio for Rev. Angela Dawson and the scripture references we used. Also link the Sojourners article on liminal seasons.

title: Create sponsor acknowledgment page for Covenant Insurance, Mitchell's Flowers, Bluff City Auto Care
body: Listeners keep asking where to find our sponsors. Need a clean sponsors.md with contact info and what each sponsor provides to the show.

title: PR: add December 2025 episode archive index
body: Adds index page for all December 2025 episodes with titles, dates, and guest names. Includes links to individual show note files.

title: Add listener resource list from the Feb 14 Valentine's Day episode
body: Listeners have been asking for the book list from the love and loneliness episode. Howard Thurman 'The Search for Common Ground' and Brené Brown 'Daring Greatly' were mentioned.

title: Fix broken anchor links in episode-archive/2025.md
body: Several internal heading links in the 2025 archive index return 404 when clicked on GitHub Pages. Affects the Dec and Nov episode sections.

title: PR: add November 2025 episode show notes (Epiphany + resilience series)
body: Adds show notes for all four November 2025 episodes: Light in the Darkness meditation (Nov 1), 'Resilience in Grief' (Nov 8), 'Carrying On' with guest Sandra Coles (Nov 15), and 'New Beginnings' (Nov 22).

title: Add README with repo structure and contribution notes for TJ
body: TJ Jackson asked for a README so the station team understands the folder layout and how to find specific episode show notes quickly. Keep it brief and practical.

title: Add show notes for January 10 episode: fathers, presence, and memory
body: January 10 Honoring the Fathers of Faith episode needs formatted show notes. Guest was Pastor William Greer discussing fatherhood and legacy. Include the Lauren Daigle song reference and the Henri Nouwen quote we used.

title: Log CPE hours for Jan-Feb 2026 (conference + supervision sessions)
body: Need to enter 8 hours from the APC regional conference in Nashville (Jan 23-24) and 6 supervision hours with Dr. Lorraine Vickers from Jan and Feb. Running total should reach 14 hrs by end of February.

title: Update CPE log through March 2026 - 28 hours completed
body: Log the December through March supervision sessions (12 hrs with Dr. Vickers) and 2 webinars (Faith and Practice Journal online CE, 2 hrs each). Total should now be 28 hrs. 22 remaining before Dec 31 deadline.

title: Add reflection notes template for supervision sessions
body: Dr. Vickers suggested I keep a reflection template alongside the hour logs to capture key learning themes. Add a supervision-reflection-template.md to the repo.

title: Log CPE hours for Dec 2025 - initial setup (4 hrs orientation webinar)
body: Setting up this repo to track 2026 recertification. Logging 4 hours from the APC orientation webinar taken Dec 10, 2025 as baseline starting entry.

title: Add community health fair planning checklist (Deacon Mosley collab)
body: Working with Deacon Charles Mosley on the annual community church health fair. Need a planning checklist doc covering vendor outreach, booth setup, volunteer assignments, and day-of schedule. Target date Saturday October 3, 2026.

title: Upload Advent dawn meditation text (December 1, 2025)
body: Add the full text of the Advent dawn meditation delivered December 1, 2025. Pastor Greer asked if we can share it in the bulletin archive.

title: PR: add Women of Faith bulletin meditation and order of service
body: Adds meditation text and order-of-service template for Women of Faith Sunday December 21, 2025 brunch service.

title: Add fall festival / trunk-or-treat run-of-show template (Oct 31)
body: Rebecca emcees the Grace Community fall festival every October. Create a reusable run-of-show template doc so planning can start early. Includes activity timeline, volunteer role assignments, and script outline.

title: PR: add 'Those We Carry' Elmwood Cemetery service bulletin (January 1, 2026)
body: Adds order-of-service and meditation text from the remembrance visit to Elmwood Cemetery, January 1, 2026. Short reflective service led jointly with Pastor Greer.

title: Update bio page with 2026 radio anniversary episode info
body: The show's seventh anniversary episode aired in Feb 2026. Update the bio page to reflect the milestone and add a short quote from the anniversary episode.

title: Add speaking engagements section to site
body: Several listeners and church contacts have asked about booking Rebecca for speaking. Add a speaking page with a contact form linking to rebecca.price@memorialhospital-mem.org and a list of past engagements.

title: Fix mobile layout breaking on small screens (375px width)
body: The header nav collapses oddly on iPhone SE screen size. The logo overlaps the menu button. Need a proper responsive breakpoint fix.

title: PR: update Instagram link to @morningreflectionsrebecca
body: Footer still had the old Instagram handle. Updated to @morningreflectionsrebecca and verified the link resolves.

title: PR: update show description and WGSP 1490 AM schedule info
body: Current site still says 'launched 2018'. Updated to reflect 2019 launch, current Saturday 7-9 AM slot, and updated listener count (~8,000-12,000 weekly).
